steps.instruction: Defeat [enemy](Bloated Miller) - Go to [zone](Clearfell Encampment)
Talk to NPCs - Go to [zone](Clearfell)
(N) or (NE) from Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Beira of the Rotten Pack)
Find exit to [zone](Grelwood)
Find Waypoint (center of the zone) - Summon Una
Go to [zone](Red Vale) - (opposite side)
Find the three obelisks & kill [enemy](The Rust King)
Portal to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs, get [reward](Runed Spikes) from Renly
Waypoint to [zone](Grelwood)
Activate the 3 [reward](Runic Seals)
Portal to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs
Waypoint to [zone](Grelwood)
Go to [zone](Grim Tangle)
Summon Una
Find exit to [zone](Cemetery of the Eternals)
Enter [zone](Mausoleum of the Praetor) - Kill [enemy](Draven, the Eternal Praetor)
Enter [zone](Tomb of the Consort) - Kill [enemy](Asinia, the Praetor's Consort)
Speak to Lachlann - Kill [enemy](Lachlann, the Endless lament) - Go to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs
Waypoint to [zone](Hunting Grounds)
Find and kill [enemy](The Crowbell)
Go to [zone](Freythorn)
Complete all Rituals - Kill [enemy](The King in the Mists)
Speak to Finn - Portal to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs
Waypoint to [zone](Hunting Grounds) - Go to [zone](Ogham Farmlands)
OR Waypoint to [zone](Ogham Farmlands) if previously found.
Speak to NPCs
Waypoint to [zone](Hunting Grounds) - Go to [zone](Ogham Farmlands)
OR Waypoint to [zone](Ogham Farmlands) if previously found.
Find [reward](Una's Lute) - somewhere in middle of zone
Find exit to [zone](Ogham Village)
(ONCE PER LEAGUE) Find [reward](Smithing tools)
Kill [enemy](The Executioner) - end of zone
Use [reward](Lever) - Talk to Leitis - Go to [zone](Manor Ramparts)
Tag Waypoint - Go to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs - Waypoint to [zone](Manor Ramparts)
Find exit to [zone](Ogham Manor)
Find and Kill [enemy](Candlemass, The living Rite)
Find the door to go downstairs to the arena
Kill [enemy](Count Geoner) - Portal to [zone](Town)
Speak to NPCs
Speak to Hooded One - Go to [reward](Act 2)
Kill [enemy](Rathbreaker), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Ardura Caravan)
Desert Map to [zone](Mawdun Quarry)
Go to [zone](Mawdun Mine)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Rudja, the Dread Engineer)
Open Cage, Talk to [npc](Risu), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Halani Gates)
Talk to [npc](Asala), Go to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Traitor's Passage)
Tag Waypoint, Activate Ancient Seal (middle of zone)
Activate 3 [reward](Runic Seals)
Kill [enemy](Balbala, the Traitor)
Go to [zone](Halani Gates)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Asala)
Defeat [enemy](Jamanra, the Risen King), Go to sandstorm, Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Keth)
Kill serpents for [reward](Kabala Clan Relic)
Kill [enemy](Kabala, Constrictor Queen)
Go to [zone](Lost City)
Go to [zone](Buried Shrines), Go to [zone](Heart of Keth)
Kill [enemy](Azarian, the Forsaken Son), Talk to Water Goddess
Take [reward](Everburning Cinders), Ignite Water Goddess
Take [reward](The Essence of Water), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Mastodon Badlands)
Go to [zone](Lightless Passage) (center of zone), Go to [zone](Well of Souls)
Speak to Lurking Creature (Reveal Desecrated mods), Speak to [npc](Sin)
Waypoint to [zone](Lightless Passage), Return to [zone](Mastodon Badlands)
Go to [zone](Bone Pits)
Tag Waypoint, Kill monsters for [reward](Sun Clan Relic)
Go to [zone](Blackrib Pit), Kill [enemy](Iktab, the Deathlord) and [enemy](Ekbab, Ancient Steed)
Take [reward](Mastodon Tusks), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Valley of Titans)
Tag Waypoint, Activate Medallion near WP (Charm bonus, can be changed)
Activate 3 Ancient Seals around the zone, Enter [zone](Titan Grotto)
Kill [enemy](Zalmarath, the Colossus)
Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs for [reward](The Horn of the Vastiri), Desert Map to [zone](Traitor's Passage)
Go to front of caravan, Sound The Horn
Talk to NPCs, Desert Map to [zone](Deshar)
Find [reward](Lailuma's Body) (Fallen Dekhara), Take [reward](Final Letter)
Kill [enemy](Hunin, Storm Caller) and [enemy](Mugin, Frost Bringer), Take [reward](Djinn Barya), Go to [zone](Path of Mourning)
Go to [zone](Spires of Deshar)
Tag Waypoint, Activate Sisters of Garukhan shrine (Lightning Resistance boost)
Kill [enemy](Tor Gul, the Defiler), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to NPCs ([reward](2 Skill Points)), Desert Map to [zone](Dreadnought)
Go to [zone](Dreadnought Vanguard), Tag Waypoint
Kill [enemy](Jamanra, the Abomination), Portal to [zone](Town (Ardura Caravan))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Asala), Go to [reward](Act 3)
Go to [zone](Ziggurat Encampment)
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Jungle Ruins) (top)
Kill [enemy](Mighty Silverfist)
Go to [zone](Venom Crypts) (center of zone near WP)
Take [reward](Corpse-snake Venom) from Corpse (end of zone), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Talk to [npc](Servi) (Various boosts, cannot be changed), Waypoint to [zone](Jungle Ruins), Go to [zone](Infested Barrens) (opposite from WP)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Alva), Go to [zone](Azag Bog)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Servi)
Kill [enemy](Ignagduk, the Bog Witch)
Take [reward](Ignagduk's Ghastly Spear), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Talk to NPCs, Waypoint to [zone](Infested Barrens), Go to [zone](Chimeral Wetlands) (opposite Azag Bog)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Xyclucian, the Chimera), Take [reward](Chimeral Inscribed Ultimatum)
Go to [zone](Jiquani's Machinarium) (within boss arena)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Alva), Take [reward](Small Soul Core), Activate Stone Altar
Take [reward](Small Soul Core)s, Activate Stone Altars
Kill [enemy](Blackjaw, the Remnant) (Fire Resistance boost), Go to [zone](Jiquani's Sanctum)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Alva)
Find 3 [reward](Medium Soul Core)s, Start 2 Generators (corners of zone)
Activate Large Soul Core near Alva
Kill [enemy](Zicoatl, Warden of the Core), Take [reward](Large Soul Core), Waypoint to [zone](Infested Barrens)
Activate Stone Altar (near WP), Go to [zone](Matlan Waterways) (nearby)
Pull all the Canal Levers, Pull the large Canal Lever (end of zone), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Go down the stairs, Talk to [npc](Alva), Go to [zone](Drowned City)
Tag Waypoint, Summon [npc](Oswald), Go to [zone](Molten Vault)
Tag Waypoint, Use Lever, Pull Sluice Gate Lever
Kill [enemy](Mektul, the Forgemaster), Take [reward](The Hammer of Kamasa)
Talk to [npc](Oswald) (reforging bench), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Talk to NPCs, Waypoint to [zone](Drowned City), Go to [zone](Apex of Filth)
Tag Waypoint
Kill [enemy](Queen of Filth) (end of zone), Take [reward](Temple Door Idol), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Go down the stairs, Talk to [npc](Alva), Open Door, Go to [zone](Temple of Kopec)
Climb Stairs twice (corner of pyramid), Kill [enemy](Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun)
Summon [npc](Alva), Investigate Platform, Enter gateway
Tag Waypoint (behind gateway), Go down stairs, Go to [zone](Utzaal)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Viper Napuatzi)
Kill monsters for [reward](Sacrificial Heart), Go to [zone](Aggorat)
Tag Waypoint, Go to altar
Take [reward](Sacrificial Dagger), Place and stab [reward](Sacrificial Heart)
Go to [zone](Black Chambers)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge) and [enemy](Doryani's Triumph)
Talk to [npc](Doryani), Portal to [zone](Town (Ziggurat Encampment))
Talk to [npc](Doryani) for apocalypse, Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Alva), Go to [reward](Act 4)
Talk to NPCs for Book Charter, Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Kedge Bay)
Go to [zone](Journey's End), Summon [npc](Tujen)
Kill [enemy](Captain Hartlin) (end of zone), Take [reward](Verisium), Portal to [zone](Town (Kingsmarch))
Talk to [npc](Dannig) for [reward](Verisium Spikes), Waypoint to [zone](Journey's End)
Talk to [npc](Freya), Activate Karui Totems, Kill [enemy](Omniphobia, Fear Manifest), Portal to [zone](Town (Kingsmarch))
Talk to [npc](Tujen)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Isle of Kin)
Kill [enemy](The Blind Beast) (optional), Go to [zone](Volcanic Warrens)
Kill [enemy](Krutog, Lord of Kin) (end of zone), Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Return to [zone](Ship)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Abandoned Prison)
Kill monsters for [reward](Chapel Key), Open Chapel Door, Tag Waypoint
Activate Goddess of Justice (Flask recovery, can be changed), Use Levers, Go to [zone](Solitary Confinement)
Use Levers, Kill [enemy](The Prisoner), Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Return to [zone](Ship)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Whakapanu Island)
Go to [zone](Singing Caverns)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Diamora, Song of Death), Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Return to [zone](Ship)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Shrike Island)
Kill [enemy](Scourge of the Skies) (end of zone), Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Return to [zone](Ship)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Eye of Hinekora)
Talk to NPCs, Activate Well of Hinekora
Pass 3 tests, Click Pay your Respects (Mana boost), Go to [zone](Halls of the Dead) (further down)
Tag Waypoint, Pass Tawhoa's test (Dex/Lightning Resistance), Pass Tasalio's test (Int/Cold Resistance), Pass Ngamahu's test (Str/Fire Resistance)
Defeat [enemy](Yama The White), Take [reward](Silver Coin), Go to [zone](Trial of the Ancestors)
Tag Waypoint, Talk to [npc](Navali), Take [reward](Tattoo of Hinekora) ([reward](2 Skill Points)), Return to [zone](Ship)
Talk to [npc](Makoru), Sail to [zone](Arastas)
Tag Waypoint, Talk to [npc](Missionary Lorandis), Enter church, Exit church, Destroy forcefield
Kill [enemy](Torvian, Hand of the Saviour), Go to [zone](Excavation)
Kill [enemy](Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia), Enter forge, Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Portal to [zone](Town (Kingsmarch))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Rhodri) at the ship, Sail to [zone](Ngakanu)
Go to [zone](Heart of the Tribe)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Tavakai, the Chieftain), [enemy](Tavakai, the Fallen), and [enemy](Tavakai, the Consumed), Portal to [zone](Town (Kingsmarch))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Go to [zone](Ogham, Vastiri, or Mount Kriar)
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Scorched Farmlands) (bottom exit)
Kill [enemy](Heldra of the Black Pyre) and [enemy](Isolde of the White Shroud), Go to [zone](Stones of Serle)
Activate all Runed Megaliths, Go to center rune
Kill [enemy](Siora, Blade of the Mists), Talk to [npc](Una), Go to [zone](Scorched Farmlands)
Go to darkness, Go to [zone](Blackwood), Go to [zone](Holten)
Go to [zone](Wolvenhold)
Kill [enemy](Oswin, the Dread Warden), Go to [zone](Holten), Go to [zone](Holten Estate)
Tag Waypoint, Go upstairs then downstairs
Kill [enemy](Thane Wulfric) and [enemy](Lady Elswyth) (ground floor), Portal to [zone](Town (The Refuge))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Go to [zone](Vastiri)
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Khari Crossing)
Kill [enemy](Akthi, the Final Sting) and [enemy](Anundr, the Sandworm) (top right), Portal to [zone](Town (The Khari Bazaar))
Talk to [npc](Risu)
Return to [zone](Khari Crossing)
Go to [zone](Skullmaw Stairway) (top left), Take [reward](Molten One's Gift) (Life boost), Return to [zone](Khari Crossing)
Go to [zone](Pools of Khatal) (bottom left)
Tag Waypoint, Go to [zone](Sel Khari Sanctuary)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Elzarah, the Cobra Lord), Talk to [npc](Asala), Portal to [zone](Town (The Khari Bazaar))
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Khari Crossing), Go to [zone](Galai Gates) (left)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Vornas, the Fell Flame), Go to [zone](Qimah)
Tag Waypoint, Activate Seven Pillars (Various boosts, can be changed)
Summon [npc](Jado) (end of zone), Go to [zone](Qimah Reservoir)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Azmadi, the Faridun Prince), Activate Grand Barya, Talk to [npc](Jado), Portal to [zone](Town (The Khari Bazaar))
Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Hooded One), Go to [zone](Mount Kriar)
Talk to NPCs, Go to [zone](Ashen Forest)
Go to [zone](Kriar Village)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Lythara, the Wayward Spear)
Go to [zone](Glacial Tarn)
Tag Waypoint, Go to [zone](Howling Caves)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](The Abominable Yeti), Take [reward](Icy Tusks), Portal to [zone](Town (The Glade))
Talk to [npc](Hilda)
Waypoint to [zone](Glacial Tarn)
Kill [enemy](Rakkar, the Frozen Talon), Go to [zone](Kriar Peaks)
Tag Waypoint, Take gift from [npc](Elder Madox), Go to [zone](Etched Ravine)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Stormgore, the Guardian), Go to [zone](Cuachic Vault)
Tag Waypoint, Kill [enemy](Zelina, Blood Priestess) and [enemy](Zolin, Blood Priest), Summon [npc](Doryani), Portal to [zone](Town (The Glade))
Waypoint to [zone](Kingsmarch (Act 4 town)), Talk to NPCs, Talk to [npc](Hooded One)
Travel to [zone](Oriath)
Talk to NPCs, Run one map in Ziggurat to unlock maps, Start mapping in hideout
